Course Title: Vendor AI Claims: Separating Reality from Marketing
Who is this for: Procurement managers, purchasing officers, business analysts, project managers, department heads, IT managers, operations managers, finance managers, executives making technology decisions
Team or Dept this is for: Procurement, IT, Operations, Finance, Legal, Executive Leadership
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with everyday business software and a general awareness of how AI tools are being discussed in the workplace is all you need to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify common AI marketing claims and explain the key questions to ask when evaluating whether a vendor's technology delivers genuine value. You will also apply a practical framework to assess "AI-powered" products critically, helping you make more informed purchasing and procurement decisions for your organisation.
